purpose: Live proof for Mobile Ad Verification API (Bounty #53)

google_search_ads.country: US (datacenter IP — mobile proxy gives better results)
google_search_ads.note: Mobile proxy IPs see real geo-targeted ads; datacenter IPs may see filtered results

mobile_proxy_value.explanation: Datacenter IPs get filtered/house ads. Real carrier IPs (T-Mobile/Verizon) see authentic geo-targeted ads as deployed by advertisers. This proof runs without proxy to demonstrate API connectivity; production calls use Proxies.sx mobile carrier IPs.
